data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for specific task types: upload document, watch video, purchase item, confirm understanding. However, the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm these task types are covered. The absence of evidence supporting the implementation of these task types indicates a gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of task types: upload document, watch video, purchase item, confirm understanding.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
